questions.explanation: Any non-zero number raised to power 0 equals 1. So 2⁰ = 1.
Law of exponents: When multiplying powers with same base, add the exponents.

questions.text: What is the standard form of a number?
questions.correctAnswer: A number expressed as m × 10ⁿ where 1 ≤ m < 10 and n is an integer.
questions.explanation: Standard form (scientific notation) expresses very large or small numbers conveniently.
Reciprocal of aᵐ is a⁻ᵐ. So reciprocal of 5² = 5⁻² = 1/5² = 1/25.
